title: Chocolate Cake
snippet: A rich and moist chocolate cake recipe using cocoa powder, buttermilk, and a decadent chocolate ganache frosting.

title: Vanilla Bean Cupcakes
snippet: Light and fluffy cupcakes infused with real vanilla bean, topped with Swiss meringue buttercream.

title: Lemon Drizzle Loaf
snippet: A tangy, tender loaf cake drenched in a sweet lemon syrup with a crisp sugar glaze on top.
